heading: Public stores
label: 1561 Public stores
text: Any premises owned or leased by the Government and used for the storage of merchandise for the final release of which from customs custody a permit has not been issued shall be known as a “public store.”
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , . That section was superseded by section 561 of act , comprising this section, and repealed by section 651(a)(1) of the 1930 act.act Sept. 21, 1922, ch. 356, title IV, § 56142 Stat. 978June 17, 1930
